case_title: FENTRESS HILL VS. CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA ISSUED TO AMANDA COX 3450 3RD STREET # 1A SAN FRANCISCO CA. 94124
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY HILL, FENTRESS CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF FENTRESS HILL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY AMANDA COX, COMMUNITY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-27-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HILL, FENTRESS AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILL, FENTRESS AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, FENTRESS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLAY HILL CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
